name: @sysml/language-server
description: SysML v2 Language Server Protocol implementation

scripts.build: tsc && node ./esbuild.mjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='stdlib';const dest='dist/stdlib';fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log('Stdlib copied successfully');"
scripts.build:all: tsc && node ./esbuild-browser.mjs && node ./esbuild.mjs && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const src='stdlib';const dest='dist/stdlib';fs.rmSync(dest,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true});fs.cpSync(src,dest,{recursive:true});console.log('Stdlib copied successfully');"
